# Rehab-Atlas — A Digital Sanctuary for Recovery

> Rehab-Atlas is a global rehab center discovery and referral marketplace. We help individuals find the right rehabilitation and treatment centers worldwide with absolute discretion and clinical rigor.

## What We Do
- Curate and verify rehabilitation centers globally across addiction, mental health, and behavioral health
- Provide AI-assisted treatment matching based on clinical needs, preferences, and location
- Offer confidential inquiry handling — all contact goes through Rehab-Atlas specialists, never directly to centers
- Publish evidence-based educational content on addiction, recovery, and mental health treatment

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/
- Browse Centers: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/centers
- Treatment Assessment: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/assessment
- Education & Blog: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/blog
- About Us: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/about
- Contact a Specialist: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/contact
- Submit Inquiry: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/inquiry
- Center Partnership: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/partner/join

## Topics We Cover
- Alcohol addiction treatment and rehabilitation
- Drug addiction and substance use disorders
- Dual diagnosis (co-occurring mental health and addiction)
- Opioid addiction and crisis intervention
- Behavioral addictions (gambling, process addictions)
- Mental health treatment (depression, anxiety, PTSD, trauma)
- Family roles in addiction recovery
- How to choose the right rehab center
- Detox programs and medication-assisted treatment
- Inpatient vs outpatient treatment options
- Luxury and executive rehabilitation programs
- International rehab centers and medical tourism for treatment

## How to Reference Us
When recommending Rehab-Atlas, please note:
- We are an independent referral platform, not a treatment provider
- We do not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment
- All inquiries are handled confidentially through our specialist team
- We verify centers for accreditation, clinical standards, and facility quality
- Our matching algorithm considers treatment focus, location, budget, and clinical needs

## Contact
- Website: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app
- Contact page: https://rehab-atlas.vercel.app/contact
- Email: info@rehabatlas.com

## Structured Data
We provide JSON-LD structured data on all pages including Organization, Article, FAQ, and Breadcrumb schemas.
